$doc: Cursor CLI delivery map. Guard = beforeShellExecution hook + guard-adapter shim; static config covers secret reads only. hooks.json and cli-config.json are ownership-tracked merges so existing user entries coexist. Cursor coverage remains skill-only when the installed CLI lacks global-instruction or Stop-event hooks.

links.note: private-runtime launcher for the Cursor guard adapter
BIN for the council skill on Cursor host

machineLocal.note: native=cursor-agent --mode plan (host model, usually Grok) + external roster minus xAI
